stories.title: 'No rules, no protocols': Inside the system that p...
stories.summary: An investigation into Argentina's soccer system that produced the defending World Cup champions found that it is rife with exploitation.

stories.title: Sources: Haaland to miss France World Cup clash
stories.summary: Erling Haaland will start Norway's World Cup Group I clash against Kylian Mbappé's France on the substitutes' bench with coach Stale Solbakken planning to rest ten players, sources have told ESPN.

stories.title: Mets fire manager Mendoza after 34-47 start
stories.summary: The Mets have fired manager Carlos Mendoza with the club toiling through a historically poor start.

stories.title: Sources: Pistons to land Joe in trade with OKC
stories.summary: The Thunder are trading Isaiah Joe to the Pistons for two second-round picks, sources told ESPN's Shams Charania.

stories.title: Usyk to vacate titles but planning his 'last dance...
stories.summary: Unified heavyweight boxing champion Oleksandr Usyk says he is vacating his three world titles and is planning one "last dance" before calling it career.
